plain:
Please set me free,
and just let me be
Cause all these policies and all this corporate greed
It really gets to me
so please set me free, and just let me be
Cause all these policies and all this corporate greed
It really gets to me,
so please set me free Cause my people in chains
we ain't diggin' through the couch but what we seekin’ is change
Cause we done been through hell
and I been peepin' the flames
All these crooked politicians, they the people to blame
So please set me free, and just let me live
Y'all done took so much, got nothin’ left to give
Wait I take that back, what I got left’s a fist
And I'ma use it to write, so just accept this gift
So please set me free, leave my city alone
This is BPT, I call this city my home! We all kings and queens, just wanna sit on my throne
But we ain't gettin' no loans, we gotta get it alone So please set me free, and just let me be great
Now you movin' into town, and we ain't gettin' no say With all this gentrification, we ain't gettin' to stay
See, y'all been eatin' off of us, and we ain't gettin' a plate So please set me free, and just let me be
Cause all these policies, and all this corporate greed It really gets to me, so please set me free
And just let me be, cause all these policies And all this corporate greed, it really gets to me
So please set me free, I just wanna live life A diamond watch would be nice, but I ain't rockin' with ice
And all this talk about these monopoles just isn't right This isn't what God meant when he said, let there be light
So please set me free, stop holdin' me back There's a war outside, my people under attack
The government don't care about us, I've accepted the fact Cause y'all was settin a trap, now we all set in a trap
So please set me free, cause I don't wanna be here Me, it's not what you rulin', I just wanna be clear
All this anti-immigration, got my cousins in fear My fist is up in the air, cause the freedom up in the air
So please set me free, it's been way too long Can't wait for the day I ain't gotta sing this song
Can't wait for the day that you goin' right to wrong But who we kiddin', I'll be waitin' till the day that I'm gone
So please set me free, and just let me be Cause all these policies, and all this corporate greed It really gets to me
So please set me free, and just let me be Cause all these policies, and all this corporate greed It really gets to me
So please set me free, and just let me be Cause all these policies, and all this corporate greed It really gets to me
So please set me free, and just let me be Cause all these policies, and all this corporate greed It really gets to me
So please set me free
